title: Fable 5 Replacement Just Dropped: Fusion (Fable Level AI)
summary: OpenRouter introduced Fusion, a system that sends one prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies blind spots, and synthesizes a stronger combined response. A budget Fusion configuration achieved results comparable to Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
writeup: The video covers Fusion, an OpenRouter system that routes a single prompt to multiple AI models, compares their responses, identifies blind spots, and synthesizes a stronger combined answer. It positions Fusion as an ensemble approach to model routing rather than reliance on any one model. The key takeaway: a budget Fusion configuration matched Fable 5 on deep research benchmarks at roughly half the cost.
